name: 10-oz bag—Spruce up your flock’s feed with Scratch and Peck Feed Cluckin' Good Organic Herbs Chicken Supplements. These delicious organic herb supplements for chickens are formulated to support digestive and circulatory health. They are developed to act as a laying stimulant with antibiotic properties that can help deepen egg yolk color and improve respiratory health. These herb supplements contain garlic
